description: Study Hardening — Fix remaining bugs, improve data quality, harden the pilot study app for real participant use, and add research-ready export features

userStories.title: Remove mockEEG fallback from StudySession.tsx
userStories.description: As a researcher, I need the unified study session page to use real ML backend data only, never fake mock data.
acceptanceCriteria: In client/src/pages/study/StudySession.tsx, remove the mockEEG() function entirely
fetchSimEEG() must call getMLApiUrl() + '/api/simulate-eeg' (not a relative path)
If ML backend is unreachable, show an error banner instead of falling back to mockEEG
Import getMLApiUrl from '@/lib/ml-api'
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add data_quality_score and duration_seconds columns to pilot_sessions
userStories.description: As a researcher, I need to track session data quality and duration in the database for analysis.
acceptanceCriteria: Add dataQualityScore integer('data_quality_score') column to pilotSessions in shared/schema.ts (nullable)
Add durationSeconds integer('duration_seconds') column to pilotSessions in shared/schema.ts (nullable)
Add startedAt timestamp('started_at') column to pilotSessions in shared/schema.ts (nullable)
Run drizzle-kit push successfully (npx drizzle-kit push)
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Server: save duration and quality score on session complete
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the complete endpoint to compute and store duration and quality.
acceptanceCriteria: POST /api/study/session/complete now accepts data_quality_score (integer 0-100) from the client
Server computes duration_seconds = floor((now - startedAt) / 1000) if startedAt is set
Both fields saved to pilotSessions row on complete
POST /api/study/session/start now sets startedAt: new Date() when creating the session
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Client: send data quality score from stress session to complete endpoint
userStories.description: As a researcher, I want the computed quality score from StudySessionStress.tsx saved to the database.
acceptanceCriteria: In StudySessionStress.tsx, the POST /api/study/session/complete call includes data_quality_score field
Quality score is computed from the existing computeQualityScore function in the component
Score is an integer 0-100
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Client: send data quality score from food session to complete endpoint
userStories.description: As a researcher, I want the computed quality score from StudySessionFood.tsx saved to the database.
acceptanceCriteria: In StudySessionFood.tsx, the POST /api/study/session/complete call includes data_quality_score field
Quality score is computed from the existing computeQualityScore function in the component
Score is an integer 0-100
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Admin: show data quality and duration in session details
userStories.description: As Sravya, I want to see data quality score and session duration in the admin dashboard.
acceptanceCriteria: AdminSession interface in StudyAdmin.tsx includes dataQualityScore (number|null) and durationSeconds (number|null)
Session detail card shows quality score as a colored badge (green >=70, yellow >=40, red <40)
Session detail card shows duration formatted as Xm Ys
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: CSV export: add quality score, duration, and phase_log columns
userStories.description: As a researcher, I want the CSV export to include quality and timing data for analysis.
acceptanceCriteria: GET /api/study/admin/export-csv includes data_quality_score column
GET /api/study/admin/export-csv includes duration_seconds column
GET /api/study/admin/export-csv includes phase_log as a JSON string column
Existing columns (EEG bands, survey fields) are preserved
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add session error recovery with localStorage backup
userStories.description: As a participant, if my browser crashes mid-session, I want partial data to be recoverable.
acceptanceCriteria: In StudySessionStress.tsx, save session state to localStorage every 30 seconds (same interval as checkpoint)
localStorage key: study_session_backup_{participantCode}_{blockType}
On component mount, check for existing backup and offer to resume or start fresh
On successful session complete, clear the backup
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add session error recovery to food session
userStories.description: As a participant, if my browser crashes mid-food-session, I want partial data to be recoverable.
acceptanceCriteria: In StudySessionFood.tsx, save session state to localStorage every 30 seconds
localStorage key: study_session_backup_{participantCode}_food
On component mount, check for existing backup and offer to resume or start fresh
On successful session complete, clear the backup
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add connection status indicator to stress session page
userStories.description: As a participant, I want to see if the EEG backend is connected or failing during my session.
acceptanceCriteria: Add a small status dot (green/red) in the top-right corner of StudySessionStress.tsx
Green when last ML API call succeeded within 10 seconds
Red with 'EEG connection lost' text when last call failed or timed out
Status updates on each EEG poll cycle
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Add connection status indicator to food session page
userStories.description: As a participant, I want to see ML backend connection status during the food session.
acceptanceCriteria: Add a small status dot (green/red) in the top-right corner of StudySessionFood.tsx
Green when last ML API call succeeded within 10 seconds
Red with 'EEG connection lost' text when last call failed or timed out
Status updates on each EEG poll cycle
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Add participant code validation with collision check
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the consent endpoint to handle participant code collisions properly.
acceptanceCriteria: In StudyConsent.tsx, generate a code with 4 random digits (P1000-P9999) instead of 3 (P100-P999)
After generating code, call GET /api/study/check-code?code=PXXXX to check availability
Add GET /api/study/check-code endpoint in server/routes.ts that returns { available: boolean }
If code is taken, auto-generate a new one and re-check (max 5 attempts)
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add researcher notes field to admin participant view
userStories.description: As Sravya, I want to add notes to participants for tracking issues during the study.
acceptanceCriteria: Add researcherNotes text('researcher_notes') column to pilotParticipants in shared/schema.ts
Add PATCH /api/study/admin/participant/:code/notes endpoint that accepts { notes: string }
Endpoint requires study admin auth
Run drizzle-kit push successfully
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Admin UI: inline notes editing for participants
userStories.description: As Sravya, I want to click on a participant and add/edit notes directly in the admin dashboard.
acceptanceCriteria: In StudyAdmin.tsx ParticipantRow expanded view, add a text area for researcher notes
Notes auto-save on blur via PATCH /api/study/admin/participant/:code/notes
Show a small 'Saved' indicator after successful save
AdminParticipant interface includes researcherNotes (string|null)
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Add aggregate statistics API endpoint
userStories.description: As a researcher, I need an API that returns summary statistics across all sessions.
acceptanceCriteria: GET /api/study/admin/stats returns JSON with: total_participants, total_sessions, stress_sessions, food_sessions, complete_sessions, partial_sessions, avg_quality_score, avg_duration_seconds, avg_stress_reduction (pre - post stress for stress sessions)
Endpoint requires study admin auth
Returns 0 values if no data exists (never errors on empty database)
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Admin: show aggregate statistics cards
userStories.description: As Sravya, I want summary statistics displayed at the top of the admin dashboard.
acceptanceCriteria: Add a new row of stat cards above the participant table in StudyAdmin.tsx
Show: avg quality score, avg session duration, avg stress reduction, total complete vs partial
Data fetched from GET /api/study/admin/stats (polled every 15s with existing refresh)
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Add study session deletion endpoint for admin
userStories.description: As Sravya, I need to delete bad or test sessions from the admin dashboard.
acceptanceCriteria: DELETE /api/study/admin/session/:id endpoint removes a session from pilotSessions
Endpoint requires study admin auth
Returns 404 if session not found
Returns { success: true, deleted_id: number }
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Admin UI: delete session button with confirmation
userStories.description: As Sravya, I want to delete a session from the expanded participant view with a confirmation step.
acceptanceCriteria: Add a small red trash icon button on each session card in StudyAdmin.tsx expanded view
Clicking shows 'Delete this session?' confirmation with Cancel and Delete buttons
Delete calls DELETE /api/study/admin/session/:id
On success, remove session from local state without full refetch
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Add stress session EEG band power averages to complete payload
userStories.description: As a researcher, I want averaged EEG band powers across the session saved for analysis.
acceptanceCriteria: In StudySessionStress.tsx, compute average alpha, beta, theta, delta, gamma across all baseline readings
Compute same averages for post-intervention readings
Include pre_avg_bands and post_avg_bands objects in the complete POST body
Server saves these in pre_eeg_json and post_eeg_json respectively (merge with existing data)
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add food session EEG band power averages to complete payload
userStories.description: As a researcher, I want averaged EEG band powers from the food session saved for analysis.
acceptanceCriteria: In StudySessionFood.tsx, compute average alpha, beta, theta, delta, gamma across all pre-meal readings
Compute same averages for post-meal readings
Include pre_avg_bands and post_avg_bands objects in the complete POST body
Server saves these in pre_eeg_json and post_eeg_json respectively (merge with existing data)
Typecheck passes
